nodes.name: Gerygone
nodes.summary: Gerygone（Gerygone）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联19种鸟类，如Yellow-bellied gerygone、Brown gerygone、Green-backed gerygone等19种鸟类。

nodes.name: Brown-breasted gerygone
nodes.summary: The brown-breasted gerygone or treefern gerygone (Gerygone ruficollis) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae. It is found in the highlands of New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
